zh.lifeSummary: 當Elena de la Zouche於1288年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖時，她的父親Sir Alan la Zouche21歲，母親Eleanor de Seagrave18歲。她於1314年8月之前與Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1360年12月3日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elena de la Zouche于1288年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖时，她的父亲Sir Alan la Zouche21岁，母亲Eleanor de Seagrave18岁。她于1314年8月之前与Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur在英国英格兰哈普爾維古姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1360年12月3日在英国英格兰史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: Elena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , now used quite frequently in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elena de la Zouche was born in 1288, in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, her father, Sir Alan la Zouche, was 21 and her mother, Eleanor de Seagrave, was 18. She married Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur before August 1314, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 3 December 1360, in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

Elle a épousé Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur avant août 1314, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 3 décembre 1360, à Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Elena de la Zoucheが1288年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー ド ラ ゾウチで生まれた時，父Sir Alan la Zoucheは21歳，母Eleanor de Seagraveは18歳であった。1314年8月以前にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターでSir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maurと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1360年12月3日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアカストレ-プウルバーバトチで72歳で死去した。

ko.Rockingham Castle, Ashby, Leicestershire: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.Ashby-de-la-Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Elena de la Zouche(이)가 1288년 영국 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alan la Zouche(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Seagrave(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1314년 8월 이전 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 12월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 카스틀레-풀버바트치에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elena de la Zouche nasceu em 1288, em Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alan la Zouche, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Seagrave, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur antes agosto de 1314, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.Rockingham Castle, Ashby, Leicestershire: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Ashby-de-la-Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elena de la Zouche родилась в 1288 г. в местности ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Alan la Zouche было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Seagrave, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur перед августа 1314 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 3 декабря 1360 г. в местности кастле-пулвирбач, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elena de la Zouche nació en 1288, en Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alan la Zouche, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Seagrave, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur antes de agosto de 1314, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1360, en Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
